[usage]> AI 工具更新速報
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Claude Code

更新至 2.1.183

2026-06-17 ~ 2026-06-19

  1. 改設定不再怕手滑

    Esc 會存檔後關閉。

    原文
    Changed /config toggle behavior.

  2. 更安全：自動執行時攔下危險指令

    自動模式會先擋掉危險指令。

    原文
    Improved auto mode safety.

Codex

更新至 0.141.0

2026-06-18

  1. Remote work keeps the remote machine's shell.

    Native directories and shells are preserved.

    原文
    Cross-platform remote execution now preserves executor-native working directories and shells, including filesystem permission paths across app-server and exec-server boundaries.

Antigravity

更新至 1.0.10

2026-06-13 ~ 2026-06-19

  1. Built-in guides are one ask away.

    The antigravity_guide skill opens docs in context.

    原文
    Added antigravity_guide builtin skill to provide instant, in-context reference guides for the Antigravity 2.0, CLI, IDE, and SDK.

No cloud. No tracking. Just yours.

github.com/aqua5230/usage
